features.description: CLAUDE.md updated for all modified modules (src/server); stale current_op references removed

layers.name: structural
layers.command: test -f src/server/CLAUDE.md && echo PASS || echo FAIL
layers.fail_message: src/server/CLAUDE.md not found

layers.name: behavioral
layers.command: grep -q 'running_ops' src/server/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'validate_backup_name' src/server/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'run_operation' src/server/CLAUDE.md && ! grep -q 'current_op' src/server/CLAUDE.md && echo VALID || echo INVALID
layers.fail_message: CLAUDE.md missing new patterns (running_ops, validate_backup_name, run_operation) or still contains stale current_op reference

alternative_verification.command: grep -q 'Parent Context' src/server/CLAUDE.md && grep -q 'Key Patterns' src/server/CLAUDE.md && echo VALID || echo INVALID
